decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to establish a lock on the opponent by utilizing artifacts that disrupt their gameplay, such as Trinisphere and Karn, the Great Creator. The deck aims to control the board by utilizing powerful artifacts like Ugin, Eye of the Storms and The One Ring. The deck also includes mana ramp in the form of Urza's lands and Grim Monolith, as well as win conditions like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Cityscape Leveler. Overall, the deck focuses on creating a prison-like environment for the opponent to prevent them from executing their game plan effectively.

This deck focuses on utilizing Mystic Forge to quickly combo off and generate infinite mana with Grim Monolith and Basalt Monolith. The deck also uses various artifact mana sources like Lotus Petal and Mox Opal to ramp quickly and cast powerful spells like Ugin, the Eye of the Storms. The key strategy is to assemble the pieces of the combo while controlling the board with cards like Glaring Fleshraker, eventually overwhelming the opponent with a powerful endgame. The deck aims to win the game quickly and efficiently through its powerful synergy and combo potential.

This deck aims to control the game by using a combination of creatures and spells to search for and play powerful cards like Gaea's Cradle and Craterhoof Behemoth. It utilizes mana acceleration with cards like Birds of Paradise and Ignoble Hierarch to quickly build up resources for game-ending plays. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Wasteland and Collector Ouphe to disrupt the opponent's game plan. By efficiently ramping up mana and deploying threats, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory.

The main concept of this UWx Control Legacy deck is to utilize a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw to control the game and prevent the opponent from executing their game plan. By disrupting the opponent's threats and generating card advantage with cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Brainstorm, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent and eventually win the game through efficient removal and powerful finishers such as Murktide Regent. The mana base is carefully constructed to support the deck's color requirements and enable a smooth gameplay experience.

Utilizing a combination of sacrifice effects, recursion, and value creatures, this deck aims to outgrind opponents by generating consistent value and disruption through control elements. By ramping with cards like Veteran Explorer, the deck can quickly establish a strong board presence while keeping the opponent's resources in check with cards like Cabal Therapy and Pernicious Deed. With a mix of removal, card advantage engines, and threats like Sheoldred, the Apocalypse, the deck can effectively control the game and overwhelm opponents with its resilient threats and resource denial.

The main concept of this deck is to rapidly cast a spell that will allow the player to directly win the game without the need for traditional creature combat. By using a combination of cards that provide mana acceleration, disruption, and combo pieces, the player aims to quickly fill their graveyard with key cards like Narcomoeba and Balustrade Spy to trigger a win condition such as Thassa's Oracle. The deck focuses on executing its combo efficiently and effectively to achieve victory in a timely manner.

This deck focuses on using efficient spells and creatures to disrupt the opponent's game plan while maintaining a fast clock. The deck utilizes cards like Brainstorm, Ponder, and Delver of Secrets to set up its draws and apply pressure. Lightning Bolt and Dragon's Rage Channeler provide removal and additional threats. Wasteland disrupts the opponent's mana base, while Daze and Force of Will provide backup protection. Misty Rainforest and other fetch lands help thin the deck and fuel delve cards like Murktide Regent. Overall, the deck aims to control the game tempo and win through aggressive plays.

The main focus of this deck is to maintain a aggressive tempo by leveraging powerful creatures like Delver of Secrets, Dragon's Rage Channeler, and Murktide Regent while disrupting the opponent's strategy with cards like Daze, Force of Will, and Wasteland. The deck utilizes a low mana curve to quickly apply pressure and control the game, with spells like Lightning Bolt and Unholy Heat serving as efficient removal options. By utilizing a mix of disruption, card advantage, and aggressive threats, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents and close out games quickly.

The main concept of this deck is to lock down the opponent using a combination of artifacts and control cards. By using cards like Trinisphere, Urza's Workshop, and Karn, the Great Creator, the deck aims to control the game and prevent the opponent from playing their cards effectively. The inclusion of cards like Planar Nexus and Grim Monolith allows for additional control and resource management. The deck also utilizes powerful win conditions like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Ugin, Eye of the Storms to close out the game once the opponent is locked down.

The deck focuses on using artifacts to lock down the opponent's options and control the game. By utilizing cards like Trinisphere, Karn, the Great Creator, and Planar Nexus, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while building up its own board presence. Cards like Grim Monolith and Candelabra of Tawnos allow for ramping into powerful plays, while cards like Urza's Saga and The One Ring provide additional threats. The deck also includes powerful finishers like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Ugin, Eye of the Storms to secure victory.

This deck focuses on utilizing a mix of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells to pressure opponents and control the board. It combines powerful creatures like Murktide Regent and Baleful Strix with versatile removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Prismatic Ending. Additionally, disruptive elements such as Cabal Therapy and Force of Will help to disrupt opponent's plans and protect your own creatures. The deck aims to quickly establish a board presence and maintain control of the game through a combination of aggression and disruption.

The main theme of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly swarm the board with aggressive creatures such as Agate Instigator, Amped Raptor, and Guide of Souls, while utilizing cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory to pump up their creatures and deal direct damage to the opponent. The deck also includes disruptive cards like Goblin Bombardment and Static Prison to control the opponent's board and protect its own creatures. With a mix of efficient creatures and removal spells like Swords to Plowshares, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and relentless assault.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures, then using reanimation spells like Animate Dead and Reanimate to bring them back onto the battlefield for a swift victory. It also includes disruptive cards like Cabal Therapy and Unmask to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck is designed to combo off and win the game in a single explosive turn, overwhelming the opponent before they have a chance to respond.

The deck focuses on creating a lock-down control strategy using artifacts to disrupt the opponent's plays. By utilizing cards like Trinisphere, Ugin, Eye of the Storms, and Planar Nexus, along with mana-producing artifacts like Grim Monolith and Candelabra of Tawnos, the deck aims to control the game and slow down the opponent's progress. Karn, the Great Creator and Emrakul, the Aeons Torn provide additional threats and win conditions. The goal is to establish board presence and prevent the opponent from executing their game plan effectively.

The main focus of this deck is to lock down your opponent's resources using artifacts like Trinisphere, Planar Nexus, and Candelabra of Tawnos. By using cards like Urza's Workshop and Grim Monolith to ramp up mana quickly, you can deploy powerful threats like Ugin, Eye of the Storms and Karn, the Great Creator to control the game. The inclusion of cards like The One Ring and Emrakul, the Aeons Torn provide additional win conditions, while cards like Manifold Key and Voltaic Key help you untap artifacts for maximum efficiency.

The main concept of this deck is to use a combination of aggro creatures and powerful artifact synergies to overwhelm the opponent quickly. By using cards like Ornithopter, Retrofitter Foundry, and Emry, Lurker of the Loch, the deck can generate a fast and threatening board presence. Cards like Urza's Saga and Mox Opal help ramp up the deck's mana production, allowing for explosive plays. Force of Will provides valuable protection while Urza, Chief Artificer offers additional support and boosts the power of artifacts in the deck.
